name: Wind Unicorn Parallel, the Dracoslayer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ウィンドユニコーン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>パラレル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Wind Unicorn Parallel, the Dragon Swordsman
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If you have a card in your other Pendulum Zone: You can activate 1 of these effects;
● Special Summon this card.
● Destroy this card, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Level 5 or lower Pendulum Monster Card from your Pendulum Zone.
You can only use this effect of "Wind Unicorn Parallel, the Dracoslayer" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
While this Pendulum Summoned card is in your Monster Zone, your opponent cannot target it with card effects, also it cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Pendulum Monster Card you control and 1 card your opponent controls; return them to the hand. You can only use this effect of "Wind Unicorn Parallel, the Dracoslayer" once per turn.
pend_eff:

action: Returns from your field to your hand
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
mst: Cannot be targeted by card effects
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Pendulum Zone
Special Summons from your Pendulum Zone
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
